# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Openfort aims to keep the latest major release up-to-date with security-related patches.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you identify a vulnerability in this library, please email security@openfort.xyz with:

- Description
- Suggested impact (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
- Minimal reproducible example
